summary: Recording quality unknown, but the post‑drums second set shines with a legendary The Other One > Stella Blue while the overall show is mixed
review: The sole review notes an uneven performance – the pre‑drums portion of the second set is solid and even features a notable Uncle John’s Band jam, but the post‑drums segment is highlighted as one of the year’s best, especially the The Other One > Stella Blue sequence. No comments on the tape quality are given, leaving the recording source and fidelity unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it praises the post‑drums segment heavily but calls the overall show only mediocre, with no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about soundboard or audience source; reviewers did not discuss clarity, mix, or other technical aspects.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Pre‑drums second set described as well‑played; post‑drums portion lauded as a highlight of the year, especially The Other One > Stella Blue.
